_note: Consolidated validation results, Sturnus MoE engine, MacBook Air M4 16GB. Captured 2026-06-23 after the gate-loss/MAML/routing-memory/logging fixes. Throughput rises with run length as expert/stream/cluster caches warm.

clean_10k.note: First clean run after routing-memory wiring; clusters spawned (was 0 before fix).

mixture_500k.note: Full 24-stream mixture (3 hang-prone disabled). MAML moved off uniform 0.25.

mixture_1m.note: Largest clean run. 747 tok/s sustained with gradients ON on a 16GB laptop.

complete_1m_postfix._note: FIRST complete run after ALL fixes incl. Bug 15 (no-op batches). Every batch trained. This is the authoritative validation run; supersedes the inflated pre-Bug-15 500k/1M numbers.

per_domain_k.note: all 4 converge to and hold K=1 (floor); per-domain Core Invariant satisfied

complete_1m_postfix.note_on_loss: avg_loss reads ~0 because local_custom (weight 0.46) dominates and is trivial; r_i (expert-contribution quality) is the meaningful learning signal here, and it climbs.

maml_emergence_trajectory._note: Per-batch loss-weight evolution from a controlled local-data run (instant, network-free) used to isolate the optimizer dynamics. l_dom (domain-routing weight) RISES as the gate sharpens; l_rel FALLS. This is the 'emergence' that was previously frozen at [0.25]*4.

throughput_scaling._note: Throughput RISES with run length (expert/stream/cluster caches warm) — empirical support for the 'routing becomes efficient with training' thesis.

verified_fixes.claim: 3 of 4 gate loss terms (l_eff, l_rel, l_div) had provably zero gradient w.r.t. gate params; only l_dom trains the gate.
verified_fixes.evidence: gradient-norm test: l_eff 0.0, l_rel 0.0, l_div 0.0, l_dom 51.0. Removed dead terms; gate update gradient-identical, less compute/batch.

verified_fixes.claim: loss-weight lambdas were frozen at [0.25]*4 (BETA_LR=1e-5 too small under the 10:1 structural constraint).
verified_fixes.evidence: separate LAMBDA_META_LR=0.03 + simplex-with-floor; lambdas now adapt (l_dom 0.268 -> 0.316, l_rel 0.222 -> 0.170).

verified_fixes.claim: Voronoi route-cache was never written during training (Clusters: 0 always).
verified_fixes.evidence: spawn_cluster wired after good timeline-B batches + merge/prune at checkpoints; clusters now 3-4 per run.

verified_fixes.claim: [learn]/[ckpt]/trajectory logging sat after an adaptive block that aborted each iteration, so they never fired.
verified_fixes.evidence: restructured: observability runs unconditionally post-increment; adaptive code in try/except. Logging now fires every print_every.

verified_fixes.claim: zero-weight (disabled) datasets were still opened at boot, stalling startup on slow/timeout streams.
verified_fixes.evidence: iter_mixture_samples now skips weight==0 streams; boot opens 18 not 21.

verified_fixes.claim: throughput is RAM-gated via expert_cap; low free RAM -> expert_cap=1 -> SSD swap.
verified_fixes.evidence: expert_cap=1 at 2.7GB free crawled; expert_cap=8 at 11GB free ran clean.
